summary.intent: Migrate the moltis web UI from plain JavaScript with HTM templates to TypeScript with JSX/TSX, using Vite as the build tool, to gain type safety and better tooling.
summary.outcome: Full TypeScript/TSX migration completed across 142 files (~42K LoC), with Vite build pipeline, typed RPC layer, WebSocket event enums, ChannelType enum, shared component library, file splitting to stay under 1500-line limit, and all local-validate checks passing including E2E tests.

repo: biome.json must explicitly downgrade a11y rules (noLabelWithoutControl, useButtonType, noStaticElementInteractions, useKeyWithClickEvents) to 'warn' because JSX makes them visible for the first time — they were invisible with HTM tagged templates
local-validate.sh runs biome, tsc, i18n-check, rust fmt, clippy, file-size, zizmor, and e2e checks in parallel — all must pass before merging
check-file-size.sh originally only checked .rs files; was extended to also check .ts/.tsx files against the 1500-line limit
i18n-check.sh uses Node.js dynamic import() to load locale files — works on .ts files directly since they are plain ESM exports, but the script must filter for .ts not .js after migration
The codebase serves native ES modules with no bundler in the original architecture — adding Vite requires changing the HTML template to reference dist/main.js and removing the import map
E2E tests use helpers.js that does dynamic import() of js/state.js to check WebSocket connection state — a compatibility shim was needed after bundling eliminated individual module files
playwright.config.js uses require() (CommonJS) which conflicts with package.json 'type: module' — fix is to rename to playwright.config.cjs or add e2e/package.json with 'type: commonjs'
GPG/YubiKey signing is required for git commits — automation that tries to commit without user interaction will stall waiting for YubiKey tap
The repo uses git add -A carefully — it can accidentally pick up uncommitted changes from other branches/sessions, as happened with vault.rs and auth_routes.rs
Rebasing a branch with deleted files causes modify/delete conflicts for all files modified on main — must resolve by accepting deletion and porting changes manually to TS equivalents
dist/ directory is intentionally committed so cargo build works without Node.js — this is the explicit design decision, not an oversight

code.finding: Modal overlay uses modal-overlay/modal-box CSS classes but E2E tests look for .provider-modal-backdrop/.provider-modal — VanillaConfirmDialog must use the old CSS classes for test compatibility
t() calls in VanillaConfirmDialog return raw i18n keys (actions.cancel) instead of translated text when i18n loads async — must use fallback strings like t('common:actions.cancel', 'Cancel')
Dynamic property access S.pending[frame.id] and serverRequestHandlers[method] flagged by CodeQL as unvalidated — fixed with Object.hasOwn() guard
href using user input accountDraft.value for t.me/ URL — fixed with encodeURIComponent() and rel=noopener noreferrer
Must expose window.__moltis_state with connected/ws fields alongside window.__moltis_stores for E2E test compatibility
28 WebSocket event types typed as WsEventName enum with WsEventPayloadMap for discriminated union dispatch
107 RPC methods typed in RpcMethodMap — sendRpc<'models.list'>() infers response type from method name

Shared component library exports: TextField, TextAreaField, SelectField, CheckboxField, SectionHeading, SubHeading, SaveButton, useSaveState, StatusMessage, SettingsCard, ListItem, Badge, EmptyState, Loading, CopyButton, DangerZone, CodeDisplay, Tabs, TabBar
useRpc hook eliminates the useEffect+sendRpc+setState+loading/error boilerplate repeated in every page component
build.sourcemap must be false to avoid committing 27MB of .map files into dist/ — source maps bloat the embedded binary
e2e/package.json with type:commonjs overrides parent's type:module so all E2E spec files using require() work without renaming to .cjs
Compatibility shim re-exports state from window.__moltis_state so E2E helpers that do dynamic import('js/state.js') still work after Vite bundling
Added secondary script tag pointing to js/app.js shim alongside dist/main.js so E2E test querySelector('script[src*=js/app.js]') can derive the asset prefix

workflow: When rebasing a branch that deletes files, git rebase replays all commits — conflicts between 'deleted by us' and 'modified by them' must be resolved by accepting deletion then manually porting the upstream changes to the new TS files
git add -A should be avoided in favor of explicit file staging — it picked up uncommitted work from other sessions causing compilation failures that required a revert commit
Large file conversions (5000+ lines) exceed subagent output token limits — must split into two passes (part 1 / part 2) or read the file in chunks and write directly
After rebase, always verify that split/reorganization commits were correctly replayed — the parent files may retain full content while sub-module files are orphaned duplicates
Run biome --write before committing after any subagent edits — subagents often produce formatting that biome will reject in CI
TypeScript strict mode with 0 errors is achievable but requires targeted narrowing — as unknown as casts work but should be replaced with proper type guards over time
Vite + Preact JSX requires @vitejs/plugin-react or @preact/preset-vite — configure pragma to h and pragmaFrag to Fragment for Preact compatibility

friction: GPG/YubiKey signing blocked automated commits repeatedly — every commit required manual user tap, causing multiple workflow interruptions
Rebase on main lost numerous fixes from later commits (i18n script, biome a11y downgrades, split file trimming, tsc error fixes) requiring re-application of all those fixes
git add -A in subagent commits accidentally included unrelated Rust files from other working sessions (vault.rs, auth_routes.rs, code-index files) causing compilation failures
Large SettingsPage.tsx (6855 lines) exceeded subagent output token limits — required splitting the conversion across two subagents

After file splits, rebase replayed the split commit but conflict resolution kept full content in parent files — sub-modules became orphaned and parent files remained at full size, causing file-size CI failure
E2E tests broke because playwright.config.js used require() but package.json added type:module — required renaming to .cjs and adding e2e/package.json with type:commonjs
E2E helpers.js dynamically imports js/state.js to check WebSocket connection — broke after Vite bundling eliminated individual module files, required compatibility shims
VanillaConfirmDialog rendered t() keys as-is (actions.cancel) instead of translated text due to async i18n timing — required adding fallback strings
Modal/dialog CSS class mismatch broke E2E tests — refactored dialogs used modal-overlay but tests expected provider-modal-backdrop
Rate limit interruptions required user to type 'proceed' multiple times across multiple days to continue the migration
biome useTemplate errors reintroduced after rebase required manual identification and fixup
open_items: 134 remaining as HTML*Element casts from querySelector/closest — eliminating them requires migrating imperative registerPage+DOM pages to full Preact component trees
providers.ts (2325 lines imperative DOM with 139 createElement calls) — converting to Preact components is a large refactor deferred for its own PR
32 Record<string,unknown> in genuinely dynamic contexts (channel configs, ws frames, gon data) — could be refined further with discriminated unions
RPC response types in RpcMethodMap use unknown placeholders for many endpoints — should be refined per endpoint as individual features are worked on
85 cognitive complexity warnings from biome — not blocking but indicate candidates for function extraction
23 non-null assertion (!) operators — legitimate uses where caller guarantees non-null, but could be converted to explicit guards
agents preset save test (workspace prompt truncation warning) was flaky — root cause not fully investigated
dist/ is committed but gitignore should be reviewed — the explicit decision to commit dist/ should be documented in CLAUDE.md
Inline styles (464 style objects) could be converted to Tailwind classes — deferred CSS cleanup pass
ChannelsPage modals still use imperative DOM patterns for some channel-specific fields — partial component migration
